mapper.update: INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries ( server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error ) VALUES ( #{serverId}, #{channelId}, #{connectorId}, #{ts}, #{bucketSizeMinutes}, #{received}, #{filtered}, #{queued}, #{sent}, #{error} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE received = received + VALUES(received), filtered = filtered + VALUES(filtered), queued = queued + VALUES(queued), sent = sent + VALUES(sent), error = error + VALUES(error)

INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries ( server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error ) VALUES ( #{serverId}, #{channelId}, #{connectorId}, #{ts}, #{bucketSizeMinutes}, #{received}, #{filtered}, #{queued}, #{sent}, #{error} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE received = received + VALUES(received), filtered = filtered + VALUES(filtered), queued = queued + VALUES(queued), sent = sent + VALUES(sent), error = error + VALUES(error)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries (server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error) VALUES
(#{r.serverId}, #{r.channelId}, #{r.connectorId}, #{r.ts,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{r.bucketSizeMinutes}, #{r.received}, #{r.filtered}, #{r.queued}, #{r.sent}, #{r.error})
